scope: wave-fresh migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only; the full LinkedIn Marketing/Community Management surface (posts, comments, reactions, ad campaigns, lead gen forms, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /rest/posts is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures

/rest/socialActions/{urn}/comments is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable

/rest/socialActions/{urn}/likes is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
no approved reverse-ETL write surface; connector is read-only
LinkedIn Ads surface belongs to the linkedin-ads sibling connector
